subject: Marketing Weekly Standup Notes
content:
Karen — 

Got it, makes sense. I'll loop in Chen from Data Science to get their
perspective on the Search Index changes. In the meantime, I've created a shared
doc where we can track the open items:

https://docs.google.com/d/36660e59856b4de5

Current open items (6 total):
- Vanguard integration testing (owner: Karen)
- Pinnacle Analytics contract review (owner: Grace)
- GraphQL Migration documentation (owner: Chen)

Please add any additional concerns there. I'll consolidate everything before our
Monday sync.

Thanks,
Grace

subject: Re: Marketing Weekly Standup Notes
content:
Hi Grace,

Quick update on Project Falcon: we've completed the design phase and are on
track for the milestone. Key highlights:

- Migrated 19 services to the new Search Index architecture
- Reduced engagement by 8% across all endpoints
- Identified 3 blocking issues (see JIRA-1442 for details)

The Sales team has been instrumental in this effort. Grace has volunteered to
lead the next phase.

Let me know if you have questions.

Thanks,
Karen
--
Karen Martinez
Acmecorp | Engineering Department
Phone: +1-353-504-9151 | Email: karen.martinez@acmecorp.com

subject: Re: Marketing Weekly Standup Notes
content:
Hi Miguel,

Just a heads up — the Legacy CRM deployment (v6.8.10) is scheduled for Wednesday
at 9:00 CET. Expected downtime is approximately 45 minutes.

Changes include:
- PR #5641: Update rate limiting
- PR #5648: Horizon feature flag rollout
- Config update for APAC region

Please make sure your team is aware and has saved any in-progress work. We'll
send a notification to #operations once complete.

Thanks,
Karen
